description:
You have a Maven Java project 'tuple-utils' located at /home/ga/IdeaProjects/tuple-utils. It contains five Java source files in the package org.apache.commons.lang3.tuple: Pair.java, ImmutablePair.java, MutablePair.java, Triple.java, and ImmutableTriple.java. These files contain working Java code but lack Javadoc documentation. 

Document every public/abstract class and every public/protected method with meaningful Javadoc following standard Java conventions. Include descriptions of class purposes, @param tags for type parameters and method parameters, @return tags for non-void methods, and @throws tags where applicable. Ensure the project compiles using 'mvn compile' and generate HTML documentation using 'mvn javadoc:javadoc' (output to target/site/apidocs/). Create a summary file at /home/ga/IdeaProjects/tuple-utils/doc-report.txt containing a count of the total number of classes and methods documented.
